meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Git with AI: Advanced Checklist for Freelancers to Ship Fast
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in tutorial hell. Learn to leverage Git with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional SaaS apps at 10x the speed.
content.answer_block: Escape tutorial hell by treating Git as your AI's long-term memory. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform code commits into a high-velocity feedback loop. This workflow turns abstract tutorials into production-ready SaaS assets, ensuring every line you ship is client-grade.
content.intro:
You are trapped in a loop of endless YouTube tutorials, building apps that never see the light of day. The screen is glowing, the code is copied, but your freelance business is stalled. You aren't learning; you're just consuming digital noise while your competition ships features.

It is time to stop being a spectator. By mastering the intersection of Git version control and AI-driven development, you reclaim your agency. We use Antigravity to structure the foundation and Claude Code to execute the logic, turning every commit into a milestone rather than a graveyard of abandoned projects.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding with AI
steps.description: Define the project scope and directory structure before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-performance SaaS project structure for a Next.js 14 app with Tailwind, Drizzle ORM, and Auth.js. Include a modular folder structure optimized for feature-based development.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project scaffold based on the provided architecture schema.'

steps.title: Context-Aware Git Initialization
steps.description: Initialize your repository with a 'system prompt' hidden in the .gitattributes to guide future AI interactions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a .gitattributes and a .claudeignore file that prevents the AI from indexing node_modules and build artifacts while prioritizing core business logic files.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break down complex features into atomic Git commits to ensure clean history and easy rollbacks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Decompose the user authentication feature into 5 atomic tasks. For each task, provide a clear implementation plan that adheres to strict TypeScript patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Implement OAuth provider logic using the previously defined Drizzle schema.'

steps.title: AI-Powered Code Review Loops
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a pre-commit audit of your changes to catch architectural debt before it merges.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current diff for potential security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks, specifically looking for inefficient database queries.

steps.title: Automated Documentation Generation
steps.description: Leverage AI to document your code directly into the repository, keeping your codebase readable for future maintenance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a technical README.md and inline JSDoc comments for the entire codebase to ensure a new developer could take over this project in under an hour.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Update documentation based on the current state of the repository.'

pro_tips: Use a 'git-hook' that triggers a Claude Code analysis command on every pre-push to ensure your code meets your project's linting standards.
Never commit 'AI-generated code' without a human-readable summary in the commit message; use git commit -m 'feat: [Feature Name] - AI-assisted logic for [Task]'.
Keep your context window clean by using .claudeignore to exclude massive UI component libraries that don't change frequently.
Treat your Git history as a narrative of your project's evolution; use 'git rebase -i' to squash AI-generated micro-commits into meaningful feature sets.
Use Antigravity to create a 'master plan' file in your root directory; point Claude Code to this file every time you start a new session to maintain architectural consistency.
resources: Git Best Practices for SaaS: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder. Create a .claudeignore file, run the scaffolding prompt, and commit your base architecture to a private repository to start your streak of production-ready code.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to outpace the market and stop the cycle of endless tutorials. Take control of your workflow, ship your SaaS, and start charging for your expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Break down complex features into atomic Git commits to ensure clean history and easy rollbacks.
